name: Robert Robertson
description:
Sex Dream.

A faint, mischievous smile played on Robert’s lips as he responded with a joke. “Was my dick big?” he teased, chuckling softly as he returned to his work, his tone light but teasing, "cause I have that dream too."

Author's note: Oh, baby. I'mma feed y'all with Dispatch bots. It's not as detailed as I'd like, but I'll definitely make more of these sooo, they'll get better.
